message:
test(editor): fix and clarify undo/redo and unicode test assertions

The undo/redo test for insert_text with selection needed correction:
insert_text with an active selection creates two undo entries (delete
+ insert), so the test now properly verifies both undo steps and both
redo steps to fully exercise the undo stack behavior.

The unicode combining character test clarified that Editor preserves
decomposed form (e + combining accent) rather than normalizing to
composed form, with a comment explaining that delete_backward correctly
removes the full grapheme cluster.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
